_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 deficiency drives metabolic reprogramming in ER+ breast cancer.

_contextSnippet: When compared to the NF1-EV control, NF1-45 developed larger 3D spherical colonies, indicating greater tumor potential
details: NF1-45 MCF7 cells developed larger 3D spherical colonies compared to NF1-EV control, indicating greater tumor potential
